description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the `EcommercePlatform` solution, which contains three projects (`Ecommerce.Web`, `Ecommerce.Services`, `Ecommerce.Data`) referencing conflicting versions of `Newtonsoft.Json` and `Dapper`. Migrate the solution to use Central Package Management (CPM) by creating a `Directory.Packages.props` file at `C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\EcommercePlatform`. In this file, enable central package management and define versions for `Newtonsoft.Json` (13.0.3) and `Dapper` (2.1.35). Update the project files to remove local version attributes for these packages and ensure the solution builds successfully with the unified versions.
